bird.name: Dusky tetraka
bird.summary: The dusky tetraka (Crossleyia tenebrosa) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Bernieridae. It is found only in Madagascar.

relations.subject: Dusky tetraka
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss. In 2023, three individuals were discovered in northern Madagascar after it was assumed that the species had gone extinct due to threats to its habitat
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
